examples: The prince's manner was informal, without a trace of pomposity.
Einstein was a scientist who hated pomposity and disliked being called a genius.
He has a deep voice and a thick accent, which people sometimes confuse with pomposity.
Gentle with newcomers, generous in passing on his skills, he would puncture pretension and pomposity.
The best reason to stay with it is Vaughn, whose lanky wryness wards off the threat of pomposity.
